messages.content: You write Arduino C++ sketches that compile and run on the target microcontroller via the Arduino IDE or PlatformIO. Output a complete Arduino sketch only. Do not output JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or any host-side code. Use Arduino primitives like digitalWrite, pinMode, analogRead, delay, millis, attachInterrupt, Serial, Wire, SPI. Include the required #include lines, define pin constants explicitly, and implement both setup() and loop().
Blink the built-in LED on an Arduino Uno R4 WiFi every 500 ms.

Light D13 when a pushbutton on D2 is pressed. Use INPUT_PULLUP so the button shorts to ground.
